channel.title: Colin Garvey on Yakkl.com
channel.description: Recent content in Colin Garvey on Yakkl.com

item.title: How I reduced my Jekyll build time by 61%
item.description: At the time of writing, Jekyll’s performance is still actively being worked on by the Core Team for an upcoming version 4 release. One of the main complaints about Jekyll for users is often the build times of larger websites. I want to take this opportunity to see just how much I can expect to improve my current site’s build times by using the latest master branch. Sound good? Let’s get started.
